items.title: Giants "comfortable with" information about Francis Mauigoa's back injury
items.body_text: The Giants picked up the 10th pick in the draft by trading defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals last weekend and they used that pick to bolster the other side of the ball.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Aaron Glenn: Huge to bring in three players with winning backgrounds
items.body_text: The Jets added players at three different positions during the first round of the draft on Thursday night and there was one common thread between their three choices.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Stephen Jones: "Zero intention" of trading George Pickens
items.body_text: Before the draft got underway on Thursday night, there were multiple reports that Cowboys wide receiver George Pickens will sign his franchise tag and the team confirmed it when they met with the media after the first round.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Arvell Reese: I'm going to be used in a unique way, I'm a weapon
items.body_text: The months leading into the draft feature countless mock drafts that set expectations about where players will wind up once the actual event gets underway, but every year provides reminders that the real thing takes twists few people see coming.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: 2026 NFL Draft Picks: Full tracker of every selection Rounds 1-7
items.body_text: Fernando Mendoza is set to go to Las Vegas with the first overall pick.
items.author: PFT Editorial Staff

items.title: Eight teams traded out of the first round, Jets had three firsts, and six teams had two
items.body_text: Half of the picks in the first round of the 2026 NFL draft changed hands before the selection was made.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Full team-by-team picks
items.body_text: Who did each team pick in the 2026 NFL Draft? Full team-by-team results
items.author: PFT Editorial Staff

items.title: Rams' surprising pick of Ty Simpson came after showing little interest before the draft
items.body_text: Rams GM Les Snead and coach Sean McVay never talked to Simpson in the pre-draft process.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Lions GM Brad Holmes has hoped to draft Blake Miller for years, considered trading up for him
items.body_text: When Lions General Manager Brad Holmes made the call to draft Clemson offensive tackle Blake Miller during the first round, it was the culmination of a years-long process of scouting him.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Brett Veach: We knew Mansoor Delane was our guy weeks ago
items.body_text: The Chiefs surprised some when they traded up to draft cornerback Mansoor Delane at No. 6 overall on Thursday night.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Eliot Wolf: Patriots will miss Mike Vrabel's "leadership" and "presence" on Saturday
items.body_text: Wolf specifically refers to the absence of Vrabel as a "tremendous recruiter" of UDFAs.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Browns select WR KC Concepcion with No. 24 overall pick
items.body_text: The Browns have selected wide receiver KC Concepcion with the No. 24 overall pick of the 2026 NFL Draft.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Texans trade up two spots, take G Keylan Rutledge
items.body_text: The Houston Texans are no strangers to trading up in round one.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Bears take Oregon S Dillon Thieneman at No. 25
items.body_text: The Bears needed defensive help in the worst way after ranking 29th in total defense.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Dolphins trade with 49ers, take CB Chris Johnson at No. 27
items.body_text: The Dolphins traded down before making their first pick on Thursday night and they traded up before making their second first-round choice.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Chiefs select DT Peter Woods at No. 29 overall
items.body_text: The Chiefs have selected defensive tackle Peter Woods at No. 29 overall in the first round of the 2026 NFL Draft.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Jets trade back into first round and draft Indiana WR Omar Cooper at 30
items.body_text: The Jets ended up with three first-round draft picks, getting help for a team that desperately needed help at every position.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Titans trade back into round one, take Keldric Faulk at No. 31
items.body_text: The Titans went offense at No. 4 in round one.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Seahawks take RB Jadarian Price with final pick of first round
items.body_text: Seahawks General Manager John Schneider said this week that it was no secret that he wanted to trade down on Thursday night, but it takes two to tango and Schneider couldn't find a dance partner.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Colton Hood, Kayden McDonald were at the draft but not picked in round one
items.body_text: Seventeen players attended the first night of the 2026 NFL draft.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: John Lynch on trading out of first round: It's the way the board fell
items.body_text: The 49ers began the day with the 27th overall pick.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Jeremiyah Love: I have the opportunity to set a new standard for running backs
items.body_text: Is the running back en vogue again?
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Roger Goodell on Mike Vrabel situation: "It's a personal matter"
items.body_text: ESPN had largely ignored the Mike Vrabel situation, for most of the 16 days since it emerged.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Fernando Mendoza: I believe I'm still the underdog, I'm on the bottom of the totem pole
items.body_text: After being selected at No. 1 overall, Mendoza said he's feels like the Raiders are a perfect fit.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Patriots trade up to No. 28, take Caleb Lomu
items.body_text: After the 28th overall pick in the 2026 NFL draft was traded twice, the Patriots ended up with it and selected Utah offensive tackle Caleb Lomu.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Cowboys take Malachi Lawrence at No. 23
items.body_text: UCF defensive end Malachi Lawrence is heading to Dallas.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Chargers add edge rusher Ahkeem Mesidor with 22nd pick
items.body_text: The Chargers added some juice to the edges of their defense in the first round on Thursday night.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Steelers take OT Max Iheanachor at No. 21
items.body_text: With questions lingering regarding tackle Broderick Jones's neck injury, the Steelers needed help at the position.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Steelers thought they were getting Makai Lemon, didn't realize Eagles had cut the line
items.body_text: As the Steelers moved quickly with the truncated window to make their first pick in the 2026 draft, they didn't know the guy they wanted was already gone.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Eagles trade with Cowboys to select USC WR Makai Lemon 20th
items.body_text: The Eagles are expected to trade veteran wide receiver A.J. Brown after June 1.
items.author: Charean Williams
